data.name: ArchiveSmokeTest_Description
data.value: Scans archive snapshots and prepares an archive-import plan preview.

data.name: ArchiveSmokeTest_Help
data.value: Use repeatable --extension options to limit the recognized archive types while keeping the existing smoke-test execution flow.

data.name: ArchiveSmokeTest_Workspace_Description
data.value: Workspace root used for runtime-defined archive state storage.

data.name: ArchiveSmokeTest_Extension_Description
data.value: Allowed archive extension. Repeat the option to allow multiple extensions.
